name: @pryzm/plugin-ifc-inspector
description: PRYZM 2 — IFC Pset editor panel (Phase 3-B Sprint S57). DOM/L7 component that renders the property-set editor for selected IFC elements (Tier 1 + Tier 2). Edits dispatch through an injected CommandBus as PsetUpdateCommand. Per PHASE-3B-Q2-M28-M30-IFC-REVIT-COMPONENT-EDITOR.md §3.2.
